# Contributing to LabelMe

Thank you for your interest in contributing!

## Contributor License Agreement

Before your pull request can be merged, you must sign the
[Contributor License Agreement (CLA)](../CLA.md).

The CLA bot will automatically prompt you when you open a PR.
Simply comment `I have read the CLA Document and I hereby sign the CLA`
to complete the process.

## Getting Started

Please see the [README](../README.md) for setup instructions and
project overview.
